description: POST /api/auth/register with valid name, email, password returns 200 and JWT token
steps: Verify token is a valid JWT string

description: POST /api/auth/register with duplicate email returns 400 error
steps: Register a user with email test@example.com
Send second POST /api/auth/register with same email
Verify response contains error message about duplicate email

description: POST /api/auth/register with invalid email format returns 422
steps: Verify validation error mentions email field

description: POST /api/auth/register with missing name field returns 422
steps: Send POST /api/auth/register with only {email, password} (no name)

description: POST /api/auth/register creates user record in SQLite users table
steps: Register a new user via POST /api/auth/register
Query SQLite users table for the registered email
Verify user row exists with correct email and name

description: POST /api/auth/register stores password as bcrypt hash (not plaintext)
steps: Query SQLite users table for password_hash column
Verify stored value starts with $2b$ (bcrypt format)
Verify stored value is NOT equal to 'testpassword123'

description: POST /api/auth/register automatically assigns free plan to new user
steps: Query SQLite subscriptions table for the new user

description: POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password returns 200 and JWT
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
steps: Register a user with known password

description: POST /api/auth/login with non-existent email returns 401
steps: Send POST /api/auth/login with email that was never registered

description: JWT token uses HS256 algorithm
JWT token expires after 7 days
steps: Verify exp - iat equals approximately 604800 seconds (7 days)

description: JWT payload contains user_id claim
steps: Verify sub or user_id field exists and is a valid integer

description: POST /api/auth/logout invalidates session token in DB
steps: Query SQLite sessions table: verify token is removed or marked invalid

description: Using token after logout returns 401
steps: Send GET /api/auth/me with the same token

description: POST /api/auth/logout without token returns 401
steps: Send POST /api/auth/logout with no Authorization header

description: POST /api/auth/google with valid Google ID token creates new user and returns JWT
steps: Send POST /api/auth/google with a valid Google ID token
Verify new user row created in SQLite users table with google_id set

description: POST /api/auth/google with Google token for existing email links accounts
steps: Register a user with email same as Google account
Send POST /api/auth/google with Google ID token for that email
Verify response returns JWT for existing user (no duplicate user created)
Verify users table has only one row for that email

description: POST /api/auth/google stores google_id in users table
steps: Send POST /api/auth/google with valid Google token
Query users table for the created/updated user

description: POST /api/auth/google assigns user name from Google profile
steps: Send POST /api/auth/google with Google token for account with name 'John Doe'
Verify created user has name='John Doe' in users table

description: GET /api/auth/me with valid JWT returns current user profile
steps: Verify response contains email, name, and plan fields

description: GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
steps: Send GET /api/auth/me with no Authorization header

description: GET /api/auth/me returns today's transcription usage count
steps: Verify response includes usage_today field equal to 1

description: POST /api/auth/refresh with valid expired JWT returns new JWT
POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns 200 success stub
POST /api/transcribe/youtube without JWT returns 401 with login_url
steps: Send POST /api/transcribe/youtube with no Authorization header
Verify response body contains error field
Verify response body contains login_url field pointing to /login

description: POST /api/transcribe/audio without JWT returns 401 with login_url
steps: Send POST /api/transcribe/audio with no Authorization header
Verify response body contains login_url field

description: POST /api/transcribe/video without JWT returns 401 with login_url
steps: Send POST /api/transcribe/video with no Authorization header
Verify response body contains login_url field

description: POST /api/transcribe/youtube with invalid JWT returns 401
steps: Send POST /api/transcribe/youtube with Authorization: Bearer invalid.jwt.token

description: GET /health returns 200 without any authentication
Free user: first transcription succeeds
steps: Verify usage_count for today equals 1 in usage table

description: Free user: second transcription succeeds
steps: Login as free user with 1 transcription already done today
Send second POST /api/transcribe/youtube with valid JWT

description: Free user: third transcription succeeds
steps: Login as free user with 2 transcriptions already done today
Send third POST /api/transcribe/youtube with valid JWT

description: Free user: fourth transcription returns 429 with upgrade message
steps: Login as free user with 3 transcriptions already done today
Send fourth POST /api/transcribe/youtube with valid JWT
Verify response body mentions upgrade or limit reached

description: Free user daily limit resets at midnight SGT (Asia/Singapore timezone)
steps: Manually insert 3 usage records for yesterday's date in usage table
Verify transcription succeeds (today's count starts fresh)

description: Each transcription increments usage count in SQLite usage table
steps: Query usage table for user_id + today's date

description: Pro user: can transcribe more than 3 times in a day
steps: Set user's subscription plan to 'pro' in subscriptions table

description: Pro user: can transcribe 10+ times in a day (unlimited)
steps: Perform 10 transcription requests with valid JWT

description: GET /api/subscription/status returns plan, status, and daily usage
steps: Verify response contains usage_today field equal to 2
Verify response contains daily_limit field (3 for free)

description: GET /api/subscription/status without token returns 401
steps: Send GET /api/subscription/status with no Authorization header

description: GET /api/subscription/plans returns both free and pro plans
steps: Verify response contains array/object with 'free' plan entry

description: GET /api/subscription/plans shows RM0/month for free plan
GET /api/subscription/plans shows RM29/month for pro plan
steps: Verify pro plan shows unlimited transcriptions

description: POST /api/subscription/upgrade with valid auth returns checkout URL
steps: Verify response contains checkout_url field (Stripe URL or stub URL)

description: POST /api/subscription/upgrade without token returns 401
steps: Send POST /api/subscription/upgrade with no Authorization header

description: POST /api/webhook/stripe responds with 200 (stub handler)
SQLite users table has all required columns
steps: Start the server (creates DB on startup)
Verify columns: id, email, password_hash, name, google_id, created_at, is_verified

description: SQLite subscriptions table has all required columns
steps: Verify columns: id, user_id, plan, status, start_date, end_date, stripe_customer_id

description: SQLite usage table has all required columns
steps: Verify columns: id, user_id, date, transcription_count

description: SQLite sessions table has all required columns
steps: Verify columns: id, user_id, token, expires_at, created_at

description: CORS headers allow origin https://audiototext.oskris.com
steps: Send OPTIONS request with Origin: https://audiototext.oskris.com

description: CORS headers allow origin http://localhost:3000
steps: Send OPTIONS request with Origin: http://localhost:3000

description: CORS headers allow Authorization header in requests
POST /api/transcribe/youtube still works end-to-end with valid auth
steps: Send POST /api/transcribe/youtube with {url: 'valid_youtube_url'} and Authorization header

description: POST /api/transcribe/audio still works end-to-end with valid auth
steps: Send POST /api/transcribe/audio with audio file upload and Authorization header

description: POST /api/transcribe/video still works end-to-end with valid auth
steps: Send POST /api/transcribe/video with video file upload and Authorization header

description: JWT token is stored in localStorage after login
steps: Open browser and complete login flow
Verify JWT token exists in localStorage under a recognizable key

description: Frontend sends Authorization: Bearer <token> header with transcribe requests
steps: Trigger a transcription from the UI
Verify Authorization: Bearer <token> header is present

description: Free user sees upgrade modal after 3rd transcription attempt
steps: Verify upgrade prompt modal appears in the UI

description: Login modal displays with email input field
steps: Open the app as unauthenticated user
Verify email input field is present and has type='email'

description: Login modal displays with password input field
steps: Verify password input field is present with type='password'

description: Login modal has 'Sign in with Google' button with Google branding
steps: Verify button has Google logo or 'Google' text

description: Login modal has link to Register modal
steps: Verify 'Don't have account? Register' link or button is visible

description: Login modal has 'Forgot password' link
steps: Verify 'Forgot password' link is visible and clickable

description: Login modal is shown when unauthenticated user attempts to transcribe
steps: Ensure user is not logged in (no JWT in localStorage)

description: Register modal has name input field
steps: Open register modal (from login modal link or direct)
Verify name input field is present

description: Register modal has email input field
steps: Verify email input field is present with type='email'

description: Register modal has password and confirm password fields
steps: Verify confirm password input (type='password') is present

description: Register modal has terms acceptance checkbox
steps: Verify checkbox with terms text is present
Verify register button is disabled when checkbox is unchecked

description: Register modal has 'Sign up with Google' button
steps: Verify Google sign-up button is visible with Google branding

description: User header bar shows user name when logged in
steps: Verify 'Alice' or user name appears in the header bar

description: User header bar shows usage counter 'X/3 today' for free user
steps: Login as free user who has done 1 transcription today
Verify header bar shows '1/3 today' or equivalent usage indicator

description: User header bar shows 'Unlimited' usage for pro user
steps: Verify header bar shows 'Unlimited' or equivalent for transcription limit

description: User header bar shows Upgrade button for free users
steps: Verify header bar contains 'Upgrade' button or link
Verify clicking it opens upgrade/pricing page or modal

description: User header bar shows Logout button
steps: Verify header bar contains Logout button
Click Logout and verify user is logged out (JWT cleared, login state reset)

description: Upgrade page shows Free plan card with RM0/month and 3/day limit
Upgrade page shows Pro plan card with RM29/month and unlimited
Upgrade page highlights the user's current active plan
steps: Login as free user and open upgrade page
Verify Free plan is visually highlighted (border, badge, or label 'Current Plan')

description: Upgrade page has payment button for Pro plan
steps: Open upgrade page as free user
Verify Pro plan card has a payment/upgrade button
Clicking button triggers Stripe checkout or upgrade flow

description: Login modal is responsive on mobile (width ≤ 375px)
steps: Verify modal is fully visible and not clipped
Verify form fields and buttons are usable

description: Register modal is responsive on mobile (width ≤ 375px)
steps: Verify all form fields are visible and accessible
Verify modal does not overflow screen

description: User header bar is responsive on mobile (width ≤ 375px)
steps: Verify header bar elements (name, usage, logout) are visible and not overlapping

description: Upgrade/pricing page is responsive on mobile (width ≤ 375px)
steps: Verify plan cards stack vertically on mobile
Verify text and buttons are readable and not clipped
